title: Camilo & Megz 10 Year Anniversary
subtitle: Puerto Rico in chapters. From city rooms and Old San Juan streets to west coast sunsets, colorful piers, Bacardí, neon nights, and the last stretch of clear water before heading home.
intro: Seven days, shoreline light, tropical color, and enough room to swap in the real story whenever the album is ready.
updateNote: Replace images inside the existing /content/day-01 to /content/day-07 and /content/extras folders, then edit titles, captions, alt text, and music in /data/album.json.

days.label: Day 01
days.title: Arrival Energy
days.subtitle: First room, first walk, first night out. The kind of beginning where everything still feels unwritten.

photos.alt: Arrival photo inside the first Puerto Rico room
photos.title: First Pause
photos.caption: First room, first pause, first breath of the trip.

photos.alt: San Juan street scene at night
photos.title: First Night
photos.caption: City lights, warm air, and the feeling that the trip had finally begun.

photos.alt: Interior of the first stay in Puerto Rico
photos.title: Inside the Memory
photos.caption: The kind of place that felt like a memory as soon as we stepped inside.

days.label: Day 02
days.title: Old San Juan
days.subtitle: Mirrors, murals, color, and the kind of streets that make you slow down without trying.

photos.alt: Quiet sitting area in Old San Juan
photos.title: Quiet Corner
photos.caption: A quiet corner before the streets pulled us back out.

photos.alt: Walking hand in hand through Old San Juan
photos.title: Pulled Through
photos.caption: Pulled through Old San Juan one block at a time.

photos.alt: Mural wall in Old San Juan
photos.title: Living Walls
photos.caption: Even the walls felt alive here.

days.label: Day 03
days.title: City Details
days.subtitle: The slower side of San Juan. Art, windows, storm light, and all the little moments that ended up mattering.

photos.alt: Interior with art and collected objects in San Juan
photos.title: Collected Over Time
photos.caption: Found inside the city, where every room felt collected over time.

photos.alt: View over colorful San Juan buildings under storm clouds
photos.title: Storm Light
photos.caption: Orange walls, storm clouds, and one of those views that stops you mid step.

photos.alt: Another memorable corner in San Juan
photos.title: Another Corner
photos.caption: The city kept giving us corners worth remembering.

days.label: Day 04
days.title: West Coast Sunset
days.subtitle: Rincón View, poolside light, drinks in hand, and one of those west coast sunsets Puerto Rico is known for.

photos.alt: Couple at sunset by the pool in Rincón
photos.title: Ten Years In
photos.caption: West coast sunset, ten years in, still choosing each other.

photos.alt: Pool and hillside view in Rincón
photos.title: Slower Time
photos.caption: The kind of view that makes time feel slower in the best way.

photos.alt: Evening scene from the anniversary stay in Rincón
photos.title: Night That Fit
photos.caption: Pool, sky, and a night that felt exactly right.

days.label: Day 05
days.title: Crash Boat
days.subtitle: A quick west coast stop that did not feel quick at all. Palm shade, bright water, and one of the most colorful piers on the island.

photos.alt: Looking out over Crash Boat Beach
photos.title: Too Bright To Be Real
photos.caption: Crash Boat looked too bright to be real.

photos.alt: Colorful pier at Crash Boat Beach
photos.title: Pier Personality
photos.caption: Even the pier had personality.

photos.alt: Another bright coastal stop on the west side of Puerto Rico
photos.title: Supposed To Be Quick
photos.caption: One of those stops that was supposed to be quick and still stuck with us.

days.label: Day 06
days.title: Bacardí to La Placita
days.subtitle: Rum, city lights, and the switch from sightseeing to nightlife.

photos.alt: Casa Bacardí sign with Meg posing
photos.title: Before It Got Louder
photos.caption: Casa Bacardí before the night got louder.

photos.alt: Neon nightlife scene in La Placita
photos.title: La Placita Energy
photos.caption: Neon, crowd, and no reason to leave early.

photos.alt: Night scene in Puerto Rico after Bacardí and La Placita
photos.title: After Dark
photos.caption: The city after dark had its own rhythm.

days.label: Day 07
days.title: Last Water
days.subtitle: One last beach, one last stretch of clear water, one last chance to stay inside the trip a little longer.

photos.alt: Last beach shoreline in Puerto Rico
photos.title: Last Beach
photos.caption: The last beach always feels different.

photos.alt: Standing in clear shallow water on the final beach day
photos.title: Clear Enough
photos.caption: Clear water, quiet moment, no need to say much.

photos.alt: Final beach view before leaving Puerto Rico
photos.title: One Last Look
photos.caption: One last look before Puerto Rico turned into memory.

extras.label: Extras
extras.title: Favorites
extras.subtitle: The shots that deserved their own section.

photos.alt: Portrait with historic stone and ocean in Puerto Rico
photos.title: Full Puerto Rico Mood
photos.caption: Old stone, ocean behind me, full Puerto Rico mood.

photos.alt: Wide coastal view from Puerto Rico
photos.title: Best View
photos.caption: One of the best views we got all trip.

photos.alt: Sky and coastline view from Puerto Rico
photos.title: Coast and Sky
photos.caption: Sky, coast, and that feeling Puerto Rico kept giving us.
